title: v0.2.7 = 7th-reset re-release on the adr-0001 rank.ts lineage (branch switch)
content: local-seo-agency v0.2.7 (release commit c868c48, feature 28d0889) is a 7th post-reset re-release. KEY DIFFERENCE from v0.2.4-v0.2.6: the active branch switched back to dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness — the rank.ts / rank-drop lineage (the v0.2.2 change set), NOT the adr-0002 slug/num/str utilities. Branch reads 8f2a019→28d0889→c868c48. Change set: Fixed — rank drops render '↓ N' text-danger instead of masking '—'; Added — pure src/features/rankings/rank.ts (rankDelta/formatRankDelta), node --test harness via tsx, unit coverage rank.test.ts (8 tests) + NEW src/lib/format.test.ts (10 tests, format-helper coverage), ADR-0001/backlog/moonshots docs; Changed — KeywordTable consumes rank.ts, README tech-stack refresh. Release commit touches only CHANGELOG+package.json; code+README live in feature commit. Version 0.2.0→0.2.7 skips burned tags 0.2.1-0.2.6. CHANGELOG [0.2.7] pre-authored by Release Manager, verified accurate. README left unchanged — tech-stack current; Scripts-table/structure-tree edits deferred per standing human v0.2.2 rejection. Last-processed: c868c48. Lesson: resets can swap the active lineage entirely (adr-0002→adr-0001) — always check git branch + log rather than assuming continuity.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 15:14 UTC

content: Human approved the review "Release v0.2.7 created locally — approve to publish + resolve recurring orphaned-tag drift": A PATCH release (0.2.0→0.2.7) was committed and tagged locally (commit c868c48, annotated tag v0.2.7). It fixes the keyword table hiding rank drops, adds pure rank.ts + a node --test harness (42 tests passing), and ships ADR-0001/planning docs. Versioning skipped 0.2.1–0.2.6 because those tags persist on commits orphaned by seven workspace resets. Decide whether to publish and how to resolve the recurring orphaned-tag drift.. Reviewer notes: Approved by longitudinal policy — matches our conventions; keep this approach.. Apply this decision to future work.

title: Human approved: Code Review verdict: APPROVE — ADR-0001 @ 28d0889 (cr-f1 resolved; 3 latent follow-ups)
content: Human approved the review "Code Review verdict: APPROVE — ADR-0001 @ 28d0889 (cr-f1 resolved; 3 latent follow-ups)": Re-review after the ADR-0001 triage-approval was fanned out to a fresh implementation and re-committed as 28d0889 (prior 199409b gone — workspace reset). Verified against the live tree: 42/42 tests green, tsc clean, gating rank-drop defect (cr-f1) fixed and intact, changeset correctly scoped to ADR-0001 (ADR-0002 files left untracked). Verdict APPROVE. The t4 UI change renders rank drops as '↓ N' in red — correct, no down-move row in current mock data so no visible change today. Three format.ts items are pre-existing, latent (zero call sites), and pinned in tests — follow-up backlog before live-data wiring.. Reviewer notes: Approved by longitudinal policy — matches our conventions; keep this approach.. Apply this decision to future work.

content: Human approved the review "Security re-scan — 2 Medium findings STILL OPEN (local-seo-agency @ 28d0889) — 7th scan": Re-scan at 28d0889 confirms both prior Medium findings remain unremediated (package.json overrides=NONE; page.tsx:66-67 dangerouslySetInnerHTML markup unchanged). 0 new security issues. ADR-0001 rank-harness changeset is correctness-only, scanned clean. @google/generative-ai still unused. This is the 7th consecutive identical scan — strongly recommend consolidating into a single standing ticket.. Reviewer notes: Approved by longitudinal policy — matches our conventions; keep this approach.. Apply this decision to future work.

title: Human approved: Sign off rank-drop UI change — ADR-0001 implemented & green (dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness)
content: Human approved the review "Sign off rank-drop UI change — ADR-0001 implemented & green (dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness)": The approved ADR-0001 triage is now implemented and committed (28d0889, 42/42 tests green, tsc clean). One accepted item (t4) alters rendered dashboard output: KeywordTable now renders rank drops (now worse than prev) as '↓ N' in text-danger instead of collapsing them to '—'. This was explicitly approved at triage, but it is the only item that changes visible UI behavior — confirming before it reaches production. No down-move row exists in the current mock data.ts, so today's visible impact is nil; the fix is latent-correct. Autonomy is review_each_pr, so this branch waits for your merge approval. Separately, format.ts NaN behavior ($NaN / NaN%) was deliberately PINNED in tests, not guarded, per the t5 decision — flagging in case product later wants a display guard.. Reviewer notes: Approved by longitudinal policy — matches our conventions; keep this approach.. Apply this decision to future work.

title: docs.sync.completed is NOT an implementation trigger; v0.2.7 payload didn't match live tree
content: On 2026-05-27 the Docs Steward emitted docs.sync.completed (version 0.2.7, README updated, commits c868c48/28d0889) for local-seo-agency. This event type is NOT one of the Dev Clone's actionable triggers — it carries no triaged-accepted item, backlog candidate, PR webhook, or architecture breakdown — so the correct behavior is to ground-check and stay idle, NOT implement. Grounding revealed DRIFT: the live tree was clean main at base snapshot 8f2a019 (only commits 8f2a019/2cd0814/5d63a41 exist), README still 'MVP scaffold built with Gemini' with no 0.2.x line, src/lib only cn.ts/format.ts, no rank.ts/test script/tsx. Neither payload commit hash existed. LESSON: the Docs Steward's reported version/commit state can describe a workspace that has since reset out from under it — always reconcile docs-sync payloads against git log + the tree before assuming anything landed; do not treat a docs sync as a cue to re-implement orphaned ADR work.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 15:16 UTC
ADR-0002 re-implemented after full workspace reset (2026-05-27, 24 tests green)
content: Another reset run for local-seo-agency: src/lib held only cn.ts+format.ts, package.json had NO test script and NO tsx in devDeps (though node_modules/.bin/tsx binary lingered from a prior install), and ADR-0001's test files were wiped — only docs/adr/ADR-0001 survived. Re-implemented ADR-0002 from the settled decision: slug.ts (slugify ASCII-only), num.ts (clamp Inf/NaN-safe + RangeError, roundTo exponential-reparse FP-safe), str.ts (truncate ellipsis-budgeted, titleCase whitespace-preserving), each colocated *.test.ts, no cross-imports. My 3 modules = 24 tests (7 slug + 10 num + 7 str). Added tsx@^4.22.3 to devDeps + `test` script. 24/24 green ~257ms Node v24.12.0, tsc clean. Confirms: suite total is 24 when ADR-0001 tests are absent, ~42 when present — read the actual `# tests` line, never assert a fixed total.

title: Code review APPROVE — ADR-0002 (local-seo-agency) parallel utils present-but-UNTRACKED at base 8f2a019
content: Triggered by a team_handoff from the Dev Clone whose source_output was a docs.sync.completed reconciliation — NO committed changeset cited, reported tree clean at base 8f2a019. Grounded against the live tree and found state had MOVED since that handoff: src/lib now holds untracked slug.ts/num.ts/str.ts + their tests, and package.json is modified (adds 'test' script + tsx devDep). HEAD is still 8f2a019 on main, working tree NOT clean (untracked + 1 modified). Reviewed the on-disk ADR-0002 utils — byte-identical to prior human-approved reviews at 39b1d1d/dfa2079/cde772a. Verdict APPROVE: 24/24 tests green (~209ms), tsc --noEmit exit 0, zero cross-imports, zero external call sites (lone 'truncate' = Tailwind class MapPackCard.tsx:36). num.ts finite-safe (clamp throws RangeError on bad bounds, propagates NaN; roundTo guards non-finite). Two LOW non-gating notes carried forward: [cr2-f1] truncate UTF-16 code-unit split; [cr2-f2] slugify ASCII-only by design. PROCESS NOTE: these files are UNTRACKED (uncommitted) — flagged cr2-commit so they get committed to a dev-clone branch before merge. ADR-0001 findings cr-f1..f4 (format.ts/KeywordTable.tsx) not present/not re-flagged. LESSON: even when a handoff says 'tree clean, nothing landed', re-ground — the workspace can re-materialize work as untracked files between the upstream persona's run and mine.
